title: metadataGpsIonoUtcParameters
description: Broadcasted GPS navigation data for estimation of single frequency ionospheric correction and determination of UTC.  Definitions and usage are covered in ICD-GPS-200L, Section 20.3.3.5.1.6 and 20.3.3.5.1.7.

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

a0.description: a_0: Bias coefficient of GPS time scale relative to UTC time scale.  Units: s

a1.description: a_1: Drift coefficient of GPS time scale relative to UTC time scale.  Units: s/s

deltaTLs.description: delta_t_ls: Leap second count.  Units: s

tot.description: tot: Reference GPS time of week for UTC parameters  Units: s

wnT.description: wn_t: Reference Modulo 256 GPS Week number for UTC parameters  Units: weeks

wnLsf.description: wn_lsf: Modulo 256 GPS Week number at the end of which delta_t_lsf becomes effective.  Units: weeks

dn.description: dn: Day number at the end of which delta_t_lsf becomes effective (1 to 7).  Units: days

deltaTLsf.description: delta_t_lsf: Future leap second count.  Units: s

alpha0.description: alpha_0: Zeroth-order coefficient of amplitude of vertical ionospheric delay.  Units: s

alpha1.description: alpha_1: First-order coefficient of amplitude of vertical ionospheric delay.  Units: s/rad

alpha2.description: alpha_2: Second-order coefficient of amplitude of vertical ionospheric delay.  Units: s/rad^2

alpha3.description: alpha_3: Third-order coefficient of amplitude of vertical ionospheric delay.  Units: s/rads^3

beta0.description: beta_0: Zeroth-order coefficient of period of ionospheric delay model.  Units: s

beta1.description: beta_1: First-order coefficient of period of ionospheric delay model.  Units: s/rad

beta2.description: beta_2: Second-order coefficient of period of ionospheric delay model.  Units: s/rad^2

beta3.description: beta_3: Third-order coefficient of period of ionospheric delay model.  Units: s/rad^3
